title: Multi select in forms
excerpt: Hi, I’m making a form, is it possible to have multiselect with an option to input your own data as the last option. Fairly common on web forms.

posts.author: AndyTaylor (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I’m making a form, is it possible to have multiselect with an option to input your own data as the last option. Fairly common on web forms.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Andy,

Great question! I think our conditional question feature could help with this.

Specifically, you could set up a label “add your own answer” and based on that chosen label, you can set up a condition to display a new question (i.e. text column) which would allow users to add their own answer - does this make sense?

Screen Shot 2024-04-17 at 11.22.13 am988×726 24.5 KB

Let me know
